name: Barbecued Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler or heat a charcoal grill until coals form white ash. Alternatively, preheat a gas grill to medium.
2. To prepare the sauce, combine ketchup, vinegar, horseradish, brown sugar, garlic, and thyme in a small saucepan. Mix well over medium-low heat. Bring to a boil, then cook, stirring frequently, until thickened about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in pepper.
3. Brush the tops of chicken pieces lightly with sauce. Place chicken on a foil-lined broiler pan or grill rack, sauce-side down. Brush other sides lightly with sauce.
4. Broil or grill, turning occasionally, until no longer pink in the center about 5 to 7 minutes per side. Let chicken stand for 5 minutes before serving.
